CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. When set, the runtime deduplicates matching source records by this field before recording matches - one match (and one notification) per unique value of the field. For example, on a LogEntry__c rule, setting this to Log__c collapses many entries from the same log to a single match / dispatch. Blank means every matching record gets its own match and its own delivery. Must be an API name of a field on the rule's Source SObject Type; validated at save time.
CustomField.label: Deduplication Source Field
